sections.paragraph:
ὀλοθρεύω (Vett. Val. 123, 11 ὀλεθρεύει; LXX; TestLevi 13:7; TestJud 6:5; 7:3; Philo, Leg. All. 2, 34; SibOr 5, 304. On its spelling, beside ὀλεθρεύω [LXX w. the forms ὀλεθρεύσω and aor. ὠλέθρευσα], s. B-D-F §32, 1; W-S. §5, 20d; Mlt-H. 71; Reinhold 40; KBuresch, RhM 46, 1891, 216f) to cause utter destruction, destroy, ruin τινά someone ὁ ὀλοθρεύων the destroying angel (s. ὀλοθρευτής) Hb 11:28 (after Ex 12:23).—DELG s.v. ὄλλυμι. M-M. TW.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestLevi TestLevi = Testament of Levi, s. Test12Patr—List 2

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

aor. aor. = aorist

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

Reinhold Reinhold = HR., De graecitate patrum apostolicorum librorum apocryphorum novi testamenti etc.—List 6

RhM RhM = Rheinisches Museum für Philologie—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 703
